nativeProps: Curated semantic listbox attributes; collection focus, selection, virtualization, and form projection remain owned by Listbox

props.name: entries
props.type: readonly CollectionEntry<T>[] with globally unique stable keys

props.name: formatSelectionSummary
props.type: false | bounded localized accessibility summary formatter

compositionPolicy.collection: Flat items and labelled sections share one strict global key space; string and numeric keys may not collide after canonical form serialization.
compositionPolicy.selection: One conditional controlled/uncontrolled API covers single and multiple Listbox selection. A bounded cache retains selected records and initial defaults across page/filter churn; never-observed selected keys fail closed. Select consumes the same model only in single mode.
compositionPolicy.virtualization: React Aria ListLayout optionally windows DOM rows, retains the focused row, and supplies virtualized option position/set-size semantics. It is independently selectable from the bounded persistent selected-text summary.
compositionPolicy.enhancementDisabling: Omitting virtualization renders the ordinary collection directly. formatSelectionSummary=false removes summary calculation, formatter calls, summary markup, ids, and aria-describedby contribution.
compositionPolicy.async: useCollectionLoader aborts superseded work, rejects stale completions by request id, validates appended pages, and exposes explicit retry/load-more controls.
compositionPolicy.forms: Selected canonical keys project to one hidden successful control per key. Retained dynamic selections keep the same FormData until explicitly replaced; uncontrolled reset restores the original default unless reset is prevented. Required is an ARIA/application validation contract, not a fabricated native constraint.
